search_items.description: A collection of composable skills for agent workflows, evaluation, and reusable operating patterns.
Reference skills and patterns for creating portable, reusable agent capabilities.
Agent orchestration framework with workflow patterns, evaluation, tooling, and portability guidance.

readmes.anthropics/skills:
# Skills

This repository documents workflow patterns, evaluation loops, benchmark practices, and review steps for reusable agent skills. It includes examples, references, and quality checks for operating a repeatable process.
readmes.openai/skills:
# Skills

This project emphasizes portable metadata, compatibility adapters, references, templates, and clear execution entrypoints. It keeps core semantics stable while allowing environment-specific packaging.
readmes.microsoft/autogen:
# AutoGen

This framework provides toolchain commands, automation flows, orchestration guidance, and validation practices. It highlights scripts, command entrypoints, and reusable execution structures for agent workflows.
